parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When set to 1 the captures the image stream from the camera.

parameters.name: model
parameters.label: Model
parameters.description: Select the model of device to use.

parameters.name: image
parameters.label: Image
parameters.description: Select the image type to output.

parameters.name: colorres
parameters.label: Color Camera Resolution
parameters.description: Select the resolution of the video. Currently only usable for the Color image.

parameters.name: maxdepth
parameters.label: Max Depth
parameters.description: The depth value pixels with a value of 1 will be set to. Specified in Meters. Pixels with a depth larger than this will be clamped to 1 for fixed point texture output, or go above 1 for floating point

parameters.name: defaulttradeoff
parameters.label: Use Default Tradeoff
parameters.description: Use the default Motion Range Tradeoff specified by the device.

parameters.name: tradeoff
parameters.label: Motion Range Tradeoff
parameters.description: Specifies the tradeoff between motion and range. Value is from 0 (short exposure, short range, and better motion) to 100 (long exposure and long range).

parameters.name: optionschop
parameters.label: Options CHOP
parameters.description: Channels specified in this allow for setting all of the options that the RealSense camera supports. Channel names should be the same as the C enumeration, with the RS2_OPTION_ prefix removed, and all
